name: FullContact Identity Resolution API
what_it_does: Resolves fragmented identity signals (email, phone, social, MAIDs) into unified person and company profiles with employment, demographic, and social data for enrichment and identity verification use cases.
use_cases: Resolve an anonymous website visitor's email to a full professional profile including employer and job title for personalization agents
Enrich a CRM contact record by matching email address to current employment, location, and social handles
Verify whether two records with different emails represent the same person using the identity graph resolution capability
Look up a company domain to retrieve firmographic data including industry, size, description, and social profiles
Match mobile advertising IDs (MAIDs) to person profiles for audience enrichment in a marketing automation pipeline
not_for: High-volume real-time enrichment at millions of records — pricing and rate limits favor moderate enrichment volumes
FCRA-regulated use cases like employment screening or credit decisions — not a permissible purpose
Locating individuals by physical address for skip tracing or surveillance applications
best_when: You need identity resolution that can stitch together multiple fragmented identifiers (email, phone, MAID) into a single unified profile with good social data coverage.
avoid_when: You need bulk B2B prospecting lists or very high match rates on sparse inputs — PDL or Clearbit may have broader professional data coverage.

auth.notes: API key passed as a Bearer token in the `Authorization` header. Key is obtained from the FullContact dashboard after account creation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 200 free lookups per month on the free plan, no credit card required
pricing.paid_tiers: Growth plan from ~$99/month for higher volumes; Enterprise plans for custom volume and SLA
pricing.notes: Free tier is useful for development and low-volume use cases. Paid plans provide access to deeper enrichment fields and higher rate limits.

performance.rate_limits: Free: 10 req/second; paid plans higher. Monthly lookup limits vary by plan.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Returns structured JSON with error codes and messages. 404 for no match is clearly documented. Confidence scores help agents calibrate data reliability.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All enrichment endpoints are read-only; safe to retry on network failure.
known_agent_gotchas: A 404 response is expected when no profile is found — agents must treat this as a valid no-match result, not an error condition
Confidence scores on returned fields can vary significantly; low-confidence fields should not be used for automated decision-making
Social profile data (Twitter, LinkedIn URLs) can go stale — field presence does not guarantee current accuracy
The Resolve API (identity stitching) requires a PartnerID tag to work correctly; missing this in multi-touch scenarios breaks graph resolution
Lookup by phone number has notably lower match rates than email-based lookups — plan for high no-match rates on phone inputs

security_score_components.security_notes: Bearer token auth via header is good practice. Handles PII — GDPR/CCPA documentation provided. SOC 2 Type II certified. No granular key scoping available.
